rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0110
rows.name:
Even after its core was stolen, why could
the Ares keep operating exactly as before?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0120
rows.name: It was because you were there, Al-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0130
rows.name: I wouldn't call it a pleasant story, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0150
rows.name: where the heart resides in the human body...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0160
rows.name:
I feel like I'm getting closer to the
answer to that eternal question.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0190
rows.name:
The heart is not something
that fits inside a body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0200
rows.name:
It is different from a person's
consciousness packaged in a [System:Ruby rt=Blue Blood ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0210
rows.name:
There are other people's hearts that reflect
that person's way of life and thinking,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0220
rows.name:
and a person's heart also exists inside
everyone they are connected to[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0230
rows.name: That's how I think of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0240
rows.name: So a heart cannot exist purely on its own[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0260
rows.name: exists inside everyone who calls you a hero.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0280
rows.name:
must exist within the hearts
of everyone who knows me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0310
rows.name:
The heart of Lao-san, who did not
forget me until the very end,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0320
rows.name: will continue to live on inside me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0330
rows.name: If you had not come back, Al-san,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0400
rows.name:
Being able to feel someone else's
heart as if it were your own[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32270100_MSG0420
rows.name: In the end, you became Lao's hope[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
